HomeDestinationsLamahatta
West Bengal

Lamahatta

The Eco-Tourism Paradise

Ancient forest cathedral where moss carpets the ground and sunlight filters through a canopy of green.

4.4
(134 reviews)
Darjeeling, West Bengal
mountainsnatureculturetrekking
20°C
Partly Cloudy
Explore

Overview

Introduction

Lamahatta is an eco-tourism destination known for its sacred lake, dense pine forests, and breathtaking mountain views. A model for sustainable tourism.

History

Developed by the West Bengal Forest Department as an eco-tourism spot to promote sustainable livelihoods for locals.

Altitude

1,700 m

Best Time

October to May

Temperature

Summer: 15-25°C | Winter: 2-10°C

Location

Darjeeling, West Bengal

Weather

Pleasant throughout the year

Summer

15-25°C

Winter

2-10°C

Monsoon

18-22°C

Gallery

Nearby Attractions

Nature

Lamahatta Lake

A serene sacred lake surrounded by prayer flags.

Culture

Dhokrey Village

A traditional village with panoramic mountain views.

KuboVista

Pine Forest Meditation Spot

A quiet spot in the pine forest for meditation.

Why visit: Peace and connection with nature

Viewpoints

panoramic

Mountain View Tower

Clear views of Kanchenjunga range.

Local Cuisine

Must-Try Dishes

MomosThukpaAloo DumSel RotiChhurpi Soup

Restaurants

Eco Cafe

4.3

Organic & Local • ₹200-400

Organic food sourced from local farms.

Cafes

Forest Cafe

4.2

Specialty: Herbal Tea

Herbal teas brewed from local herbs.

Street Food

Momo Stall at Main Market

Freshly steamed and fried momos with spicy chutney

Thukpa Corner

Hot noodle soup with local vegetables and meat

Shopping

Eco Shop

Sustainable products and local crafts.

Bamboo craftsOrganic spicesHandmade paper

Culture & Festivals

Culture

Rich Himalayan culture with Buddhist monasteries and Nepali traditions.

LosarBuddha JayantiDashainTihar

Adventure Activities

Nature Walk

Easy

Guided walk through pine and dhupi forests.

2 hrs
₹500

Suggested Itineraries

Activities

  • • Lake visit
  • • Forest walk
  • • Village interaction
Organic lunch, Herbal tea
Taxi from Darjeeling
N/A
₹1,500

How to Reach

train

Nearest railway station is New Jalpaiguri (NJP)

~3 hrs drive
₹150-500

flight

Nearest airport is Bagdogra (IXB)

~2.5 hrs drive
₹3,000-8,000

bus

Direct buses from Siliguri and Darjeeling

~3-4 hrs
₹200-400

car

Private taxis and shared jeeps available

~2.5 hrs
₹2,500-4,000

Nearby Railway

New Jalpaiguri Junction (NJP) - 72 km

Nearby Airport

Bagdogra Airport (IXB) - 78 km

Taxi Fare

Shared: ₹150-200, Private: ₹2,500-3,500

Bike Rental

₹500-800/day (Royal Enfield/Scooty)

October to May offers clear skies and pleasant weather.
